metadata.description: Primary-source-first, always-latest documentation tooling. Home of the LiveDocs engine and (future) long-tail per-source adapters.

plugins.name: livedocs
plugins.description: Always-latest docs engine — auto-discovers llms.txt / package registry / repo / OpenAPI / GraphQL / CLI and reads them live and raw. High-fidelity alternative to pre-built docs indexes. 4 tools + a docs-router skill.
